title: Luffy’s Grief and the ASL Past: Key Exchange
description: In the Post-War / ASL Flashback storyline, this section centers on Luffy, Sabo, Unknown person #17, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #12 as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Luffy, Sabo, Unknown person #17, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #8, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy’s grief and the asl past: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Get your hands off our ace!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What are you all doing here?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Isn't that SABO kid with you?!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Sabo's safe ... He's not with us...!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: What d'you think you're saying, Ace M'boy?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I'll take full responsibility for ace...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Why did this have to happen...?!!

summary: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Luffy, Sabo, Unknown person #17, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #8, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy’s grief and the asl past: key exchange.
